summary: Plumbed quality.dofStrength into all 6 point-based systems. Added `dofStrength?: number` to each system's config interface (ParticleFieldConfig, CrystalFieldConfig, FlowRibbonFieldConfig, RibbonFieldConfig, PointCloudConfig, TerrainHeightfieldConfig). Changed each system's uDofStrength uniform from hardcoded 0.6 to `config?.dofStrength ?? 0.6`. Updated main.ts to pass `dofStrength: quality.dofStrength` to all 6 create calls. Low tier now gets dofStrength=0 (no wasted GPU), medium=0.4, high=0.6. Build passes, all 36 tests pass.
